hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{let cmd='';try{cmd=JSON.parse(d).tool_input.command||''}catch(e){};if(/git push/.test(cmd)&&/(^|[^-\w])(origin\s+)?(main|master)([^-\w]|$)/.test(cmd)){console.error('Push to main is blocked - use a feature branch + PR');process.exit(2)}process.exit(0)})"
